title: ExecutionRecord
description: An immutable record of a plan execution, capturing every action taken, artifacts generated, and acceptance test results.

record_id.description: Unique identifier for this execution record.

plan_id.description: The identifier of the execution plan that was run.

lease_id.description: The identifier of the capability lease under which execution occurred.

step_id.description: The step from the execution plan that this action corresponds to.

path.description: The filesystem path on which the operation was performed.

status.description: The outcome status of this action.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this action was executed.

actions.description: The list of actions taken during execution.

artifacts_generated.description: Paths or identifiers of artifacts produced during execution.

test_id.description: The identifier of the acceptance test that was run.

output.description: The captured output from the acceptance test execution.

acceptance_results.description: Results of acceptance tests run after execution.

execution_status.description: The overall status of the execution.

executed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when execution completed.

executor_node_id.description: Optional identifier of the node that performed the execution.

algorithm.description: The cryptographic algorithm used for signing.

signer_role.description: The role of the entity that produced this signature.

signature.description: Optional cryptographic signature over this execution record.
